slides.headline: Maximize Certification Accuracy
slides.body: Avoid common certification errors by following these training time calculation best practices used by experienced VASCOs.

slides.headline: Understand the 22-1999
slides.body: Understand the 22-1999 form requirements for calculating training time.
bullets: Identify the start and end dates

slides.headline: Account for Continuous Training
slides.body: Accurately account for continuous training periods.

slides.headline: Exclude Non-Training Days
slides.body: Exclude days when training was not provided.

slides.headline: Verify with VA Forms
slides.body: Cross-reference your calculations with relevant VA forms.

slides.headline: Document Everything
slides.body: Maintain detailed records of training time calculations.
Explore VASCO Assistant Pro for automating your certification processes.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Maximize certification accuracy by following these training time calculation best practices used by experienced VASCOs. Learn how to avoid common errors and streamline your workflow with VASCO Assistant Pro.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 1 of 5, as it could benefit from a more engaging headline to draw attention.
